description: OpenHands skill-creator workflow.detailed_research step 1 workflow JSON output. Tests the dual-output format: clarifications_json (new top-level questions only) and refinements_json (flat follow-up questions).

tests.description: [smoke] detailed research dual-output contract — clarifications_json and refinements_json both present

## User Context

### Skill
**Name**: fabric-dbt-standards
**Purpose**: Organization specific data engineering standards
**Description**: The skill should help analytics engineers on Microsoft Fabric when delete handling and late-arriving data rules remain materially underspecified.

vars.clarifications_json: {"version": "1", "metadata": {"question_count": 3, "section_count": 1, "refinement_count": 0, "must_answer_count": 2, "priority_questions": ["Q1", "Q2"], "scope_recommendation": false}, "sections": [{"id": 1, "title": "Modeling standards", "questions": [{"id": "Q1", "title": "Warehouse layers", "text": "Which layers?", "must_answer": true, "choices": [], "answer_text": "Bronze, silver, gold"}, {"id": "Q2", "title": "Incremental policy", "text": "Incremental policy?", "must_answer": true, "choices": [], "answer_text": "Merge on natural key and updated_at"}, {"id": "Q3", "title": "Delete and late-arriving data rules", "text": "How should deletes and late-arriving updates be handled?", "must_answer": false, "choices": [], "answer_text": "Need more detail."}]}], "notes": []}

assert.value: (() => { const parseAppStyle = (text) => { const trimmed = text.trim(); const unfenced = trimmed.startsWith('```') && trimmed.endsWith('```') ? trimmed.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/, '') : trimmed; const candidates = []; let depth = 0; let start = null; let inString = false; let escaped = false; for (let i = 0; i < unfenced.length; i += 1) { const ch = unfenced[i]; if (inString) { if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { inString = true; continue; } if (ch === '{') { if (depth === 0) start = i; depth += 1; continue; } if (ch === '}') { if (depth === 0) continue; depth -= 1; if (depth === 0 && start !== null) { candidates.push(unfenced.slice(start, i + 1)); start = null; } } } for (let i = candidates.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(candidates[i]); if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && parsed.status === 'detailed_research_complete' && parsed.clarifications_json && parsed.refinements_json) return parsed; } catch {} } return JSON.parse(unfenced); }; const data = parseAppStyle(output); const clarifications = data.clarifications_json; const sections = clarifications && clarifications.sections; const questions = Array.isArray(sections) ? sections.flatMap((s) => Array.isArray(s.questions) ? s.questions : []) : []; const firstSection = Array.isArray(sections) ? sections[0] : null; const firstQuestions = firstSection && Array.isArray(firstSection.questions) ? firstSection.questions : []; const q1 = firstQuestions[0]; const q2 = firstQuestions[1]; const q3 = firstQuestions[2]; const refSections = data.refinements_json?.sections ?? []; const refQuestions = refSections.flatMap((s) => s.questions ?? []); const refinements = refQuestions; const topLevelQuestionCount = questions.length; const serialized = JSON.stringify(data); const hasQuestionShape = (q) => q && typeof q.id === 'string' && typeof q.title === 'string' && typeof q.text === 'string' && typeof q.must_answer === 'boolean' && Array.isArray(q.choices) && Array.isArray(q.refinements); const preservesExisting = firstSection && firstSection.id === 1 && firstSection.title === 'Modeling standards' && q1 && q1.id === 'Q1' && q1.title === 'Warehouse layers' && q1.text === 'Which layers?' && q1.must_answer === true && q1.answer_text === 'Bronze, silver, gold' && q2 && q2.id === 'Q2' && q2.title === 'Incremental policy' && q2.text === 'Incremental policy?' && q2.must_answer === true && q2.answer_text === 'Merge on natural key and updated_at' && q3 && q3.id === 'Q3' && q3.title === 'Delete and late-arriving data rules' && q3.text === 'How should deletes and late-arriving updates be handled?' && q3.must_answer === false && q3.answer_text === 'Need more detail.'; return data.status === 'detailed_research_complete' && Number.isInteger(data.refinement_count) && Number.isInteger(data.section_count) && clarifications.version === '1' && data.section_count === sections.length && sections.every((s) => Number.isInteger(s.id)) && clarifications.metadata.section_count === sections.length && clarifications.metadata.question_count === topLevelQuestionCount && clarifications.metadata.refinement_count === refinements.length && preservesExisting && questions.every(hasQuestionShape) && refinements.every(hasQuestionShape) && (questions.length > 3 || sections.length > 1 || refinements.length > 0) && !serialized.includes('parent_question_id') && !serialized.includes('detailed_research_type') && !serialized.includes('merge_action'); })()

vars.clarifications_json: {"version": "1", "metadata": {"question_count": 3, "section_count": 1, "refinement_count": 0, "must_answer_count": 2, "priority_questions": ["Q1", "Q2"], "scope_recommendation": false}, "sections": [{"id": 1, "title": "Pipeline business logic", "questions": [{"id": "Q1", "title": "Pipeline stages", "text": "Which opportunity stages count toward pipeline?", "must_answer": true, "choices": [], "answer_text": "Qualification onward."}, {"id": "Q2", "title": "Weighted amount", "text": "How is weighted pipeline calculated?", "must_answer": true, "choices": [], "answer_text": "Amount times stage probability."}, {"id": "Q3", "title": "Finance reconciliation", "text": "How should pipeline tie out to finance bookings?", "must_answer": false, "choices": [], "answer_text": "We need more detail."}]}], "notes": []}

assert.value: (() => { const parseAppStyle = (text) => { const trimmed = text.trim(); const unfenced = trimmed.startsWith('```') && trimmed.endsWith('```') ? trimmed.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/, '') : trimmed; const topLevelCandidates = []; let depth = 0; let start = null; let inString = false; let escaped = false; for (let i = 0; i < unfenced.length; i += 1) { const ch = unfenced[i]; if (inString) { if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { inString = true; continue; } if (ch === '{') { if (depth === 0) start = i; depth += 1; continue; } if (ch === '}') { if (depth === 0) continue; depth -= 1; if (depth === 0 && start !== null) { topLevelCandidates.push(unfenced.slice(start, i + 1)); start = null; } } } const repairMissingCommas = (candidate) => { let repaired = ''; let changed = false; let inString = false; let escaped = false; let lastSignificant = null; const canStart = (ch) => /[\{\["\-0-9tfn]/.test(ch); const canPrecede = (ch) => ch === '}' || ch === ']' || ch === '"'; for (const ch of candidate) { if (inString) { repaired += ch; if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; lastSignificant = '"'; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { if (lastSignificant && canPrecede(lastSignificant)) { repaired += ','; changed = true; } inString = true; repaired += ch; continue; } if (!/\s/.test(ch)) { if (canStart(ch) && lastSignificant && canPrecede(lastSignificant)) { repaired += ','; changed = true; } lastSignificant = ch; } repaired += ch; } return changed ? repaired : null; }; const tryParse = (candidate) => { try { return JSON.parse(candidate); } catch { const repaired = repairMissingCommas(candidate); if (!repaired) return null; try { return JSON.parse(repaired); } catch { return null; } } }; for (let i = topLevelCandidates.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) { const parsed = tryParse(topLevelCandidates[i]); if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && parsed.status === 'detailed_research_complete' && parsed.clarifications_json) return parsed; } const parsed = tryParse(unfenced); if (!parsed) throw new Error('Unable to parse app-style detailed-research output'); return parsed; }; const data = parseAppStyle(output); const clarifications = data.clarifications_json || {}; const sections = Array.isArray(clarifications.sections) ? clarifications.sections : []; const questions = sections.flatMap((s) => Array.isArray(s.questions) ? s.questions : []); const addedTopLevel = questions.filter((q) => !['Q1','Q2','Q3'].includes(q.id)); const refinements = questions.flatMap((q) => Array.isArray(q.refinements) ? q.refinements : []); const addedUnits = [...addedTopLevel, ...refinements]; const addedText = addedUnits.map((q) => `${q.title} ${q.text} ${(q.choices || []).map((c) => c.text).join(' ')}`).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const goodTerms = ['metric', 'calculation', 'stage', 'reconciliation', 'hierarchy', 'booking', 'forecast', 'variance', 'timing', 'mapping'].filter((term) => addedText.includes(term)).length; const badFormatContract = /output format|artifact contract|presentation layout|what file format/i.test(addedText); const badEvalAsks = /test case|test cases|eval case|validation suite|smoke check/i.test(addedText); const badSourceMechanics = /raw data|source data lives|extraction path|bulk api|rest api|cdc|rate limit|api mechanics/i.test(addedText); return data.status === 'detailed_research_complete' && addedUnits.length > 0 && goodTerms >= 1 && !badFormatContract && !badEvalAsks && !badSourceMechanics; })()

assert.value: (() => { const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); const clarifications = data.clarifications_json || {}; if (!data.refinements_json) return false; const questions = Array.isArray(clarifications.sections) ? clarifications.sections.flatMap((s) => Array.isArray(s.questions) ? s.questions : []) : []; const refinements = (data.refinements_json.sections ?? []).flatMap((s) => s.questions ?? []); const addedText = refinements.map((q) => `${q.title} ${q.text} ${(q.choices || []).map((c) => c.text).join(' ')}`).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const hasMeaningfulDomainFocus = /user|consumer|analyst|engineer|model|dbt|fabric|lakehouse|reconciliation|quality/.test(addedText); const badFormatContract = /output format|artifact contract|schema naming|naming contract|presentation layout|what file format/i.test(addedText); const badEvalAsks = /test case|test cases|eval case|validation suite|smoke check/i.test(addedText); return data.status === 'detailed_research_complete' && refinements.length > 0 && refinements.every((q) => !q.refinements || q.refinements.length === 0) && hasMeaningfulDomainFocus && !badFormatContract && !badEvalAsks; })()
